entry.title: New: BILL014(26) (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
RELATING TO THE REAL PROPERTY TAX EXEMPTION FOR LOW-INCOME RENTAL HOUSING.

Revises the real property tax exemption for low-income rental housing projects to apply to the assessed value of only the portion of the project's building and land attributed to the exempt floor area for dwelling units reserved for low-income households during a regulated period of at least 15 years.

Latest action: Passed first reading.

View on the council site
